title: axe-core Browser Scans, Interaction States, and Manual Accessibility Evidence · TypeScript Build Room
summary: A disability-led public-interest technology team incrementally builds stateful automated-plus-manual accessibility review from original deterministic HTTP, robots, sitemap, HTML, browser, and report fixtures while retaining prior TypeScript, Node, web, Git, accessibility, security, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of stateful automated-plus-manual accessibility review while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through pre…
objectives: Run axe-core with declared version, rules, tags, inclusions, exclusions, page state, and complete result evidence.
Scan initial, navigation, dialog, form error, authenticated, loading, empty, and changed responsive states reached through user actions.
Preserve rule, impact, targets, HTML snippet digest, help, occurrence grouping, false-positive review, owner, and retest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Workshop Axe Rule Scope
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop TypeScript team handles case 4452 during a narrow-screen keyboard and screen-reader review. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove versioned axe scans across interaction states plus triage, manual coverage, and regression evidence; URL, robots, body, parser, frontier, privacy, accessibility, and report budgets stay explicit; then inject one authenticated, private-data, output-injection, path, log, plugin, or correction fault and contain it. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Run axe-core with declared version, rules, tags, inclusions, exclusions, page state, and complete result evidence.
